content.full_text:
990 W. Birchcrest Avenue  
Brea, California 92621  
August 13, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, California 95812

Attention: Ms. Deanne Stone

Dear Ms. Stone:

Yesterday I spoke with you on the telephone about a possible conflict of interest for a school board member receiving a salary becoming elected to the city council. You told me that there would be no conflict for the new city council member voting on school issues because there was a specific exemption for governmental agencies.

You stated that I would need to request for an opinion in writing in order to receive a written response to my question. Please consider this my written request for a response in writing.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Lynn Daucher
